rationale: Review 2's includeRight_apply (line 119, pure rfl duplicating Mathlib's simp), map_tmul (211), map_to*Hom (242), and antipode_tmul (192) findings identify real duplicate specializations of existing Mathlib lemmas (Bialgebra.TensorProduct.*, TensorProduct.antipode_def, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply) that would be removed by acting on it, directly improving reuse. Review 1's approve misses them (and the private-general-helpers point is secondary); the resulting PR after Review 2 is cleaner with no needless duplication.
